title: Radboud UMC places 12 staff in precautionary quarantine
description: Radboud University Medical Centre in Nijmegen places 12 hospital staff in precautionary quarantine after an incorrect blood sampling procedure was followed with a confirmed Andes virus patient.

title: ECDC confirms 11 cases; Emory patient tests negative
description: ECDC epidemiological update confirms 11 total cases (9 confirmed, 2 probable). Emory University Hospital reports mildly symptomatic U.S. passenger tests NEGATIVE for hantavirus. All passengers repatriated; MV Hondius en route Rotterdam.

title: All passengers disembarked; WHO confirms 11 total cases
description: All MV Hondius passengers disembarked at Tenerife. U.S. passengers (18 total) arrive Offutt AFB; 15 to UNMC quarantine, 1 confirmed positive to biocontainment, 2 to Emory Atlanta. French female confirmed positive; Spanish male preliminary positive. WHO: 11 cases (9 confirmed, 2 probable).

title: MV Hondius arrives Tenerife; evacuations begin
description: MV Hondius arrives Tenerife. UK passengers (22 total: 19 passengers, 3 crew) flown to Manchester; 72-hour quarantine at Arrowe Park Hospital, then 45-day home isolation. WHO Director-General Tedros present at Tenerife.

title: Pathoplexus publishes multi-sequence analysis confirming single zoonotic spill
description: Pathoplexus publishes analysis of sequences from 5 patients on Virological.org. Sequences are all very similar to each other, suggesting a single zoonotic spill origin.

title: CDC issues HAN 528; complete genome sequence published
description: CDC issues Health Alert Network advisory 528. 8 cases (6 confirmed, 2 suspected), 3 deaths. Complete genome sequence ANDV/Switzerland/Hu-3337/2026 published on Virological.org. KLM flight attendant hospitalized Amsterdam UMC. NJ DOH announces monitoring 2 residents.

title: CDC deploys team to Canary Islands; France activates emergency response
description: CDC deploys team to Canary Islands to support response. ANRS France activates Level 1 Emergency Response.

title: WHO confirms Andes virus; ECDC publishes Rapid Risk Assessment
description: WHO confirms Andes virus as the causative agent. ECDC publishes Rapid Risk Assessment. Ship departs Cape Verde for Tenerife. Three patients evacuated to Netherlands (Leiden UMC, Radboud UMC).

title: Swiss case confirmed by Geneva University Hospitals
description: Swiss case confirmed by Geneva University Hospitals — passenger who had disembarked at Saint Helena on April 24.

title: WHO publishes DON599 — 7 cases, 3 deaths
description: WHO publishes Disease Outbreak News 599. 7 cases: 2 confirmed, 5 suspected. 3 deaths. Identification of Andes virus performed through genomic sequencing at NICD and virus-specific PCR at Geneva University Hospitals.

title: Ship docks Praia, Cape Verde; PCR confirms Case 2
description: MV Hondius docks at Praia, Cape Verde. No disembarkation — local facilities insufficient for isolation. PCR posthumously confirms Case 2 had Andes virus.

title: Case 3 PCR confirms hantavirus; Case 4 dies aboard
description: Case 3 PCR confirms hantavirus. Case 4 (German female) dies aboard the vessel. WHO notified by UK IHR Focal Point.

title: Case 4 (German female) symptom onset
description: Case 4, a German female passenger, develops symptoms consistent with hantavirus pulmonary syndrome while aboard MV Hondius.

title: Case 3 medically evacuated from Ascension Island
description: Case 3 (British male presenting with pneumonia) medically evacuated from Ascension Island to a South Africa ICU.

title: Case 2 dies at Johannesburg emergency department
description: Case 2 (Dutch female) dies at a Johannesburg emergency department after deteriorating en route on the Airlink flight from Saint Helena. PCR later posthumously confirms Andes virus.

title: Case 2 boards Airlink flight; briefly boards KLM KL592
description: Case 2 boards Airlink flight (82 pax, 6 crew) from Saint Helena to Johannesburg, deteriorating en route. Briefly boards KLM KL592 (Johannesburg → Amsterdam) but is removed before takeoff after approximately 45 minutes. KL592 departs without her.

title: Body of Case 1 removed; Case 2 disembarks Saint Helena
description: Body of Case 1 (Dutch male who died April 11) removed to Saint Helena. Case 2 (Dutch female) and approximately 30 total passengers disembark at Saint Helena.

title: Ship stops at Tristan da Cunha
description: MV Hondius stops at Tristan da Cunha April 13–15. One island resident later suspected of exposure.

title: Case 1 dies aboard MV Hondius
description: Case 1 (Dutch male) dies aboard MV Hondius. No PCR performed at time of death. Symptom onset had occurred approximately April 6.

title: Case 1 symptom onset
description: Case 1 (Dutch male passenger) develops initial symptoms: fever, headache, and mild diarrhea while aboard MV Hondius.

title: MV Hondius departs Ushuaia, Argentina
description: MV Hondius departs Ushuaia, Argentina with 147 passengers and crew from 23 nationalities on an Antarctic expedition cruise.
